'''Beltrix III''' was a factory [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Beltrix system/Legends|Beltrix system]], one of the [[Six Local Systems]]. It was the site of the Rebel headquarters in the [[Six Local Systems]] and also the headquarters of the [[Holstrum Talent Agency]], a front for Rebel recruitment in which [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] Agent [[Keth Beamis]] worked as a talent scout. The cell on Beltrix III was established by [[Tet Tramys]], [[Tendis Ancum]], and [[Jioie Ancum]].

Tendis was a native of [[Tuttin IV]], but had taken a job as a foreman at a factory on Beltrix III when the Empire took over Tuttin IV. His wife, Jioie, accompanied him as his assistant. Their jobs were cover for their role in the Alliance. The two left their son, [[Ryley Ancum]], in the care of [[Shran Etison]]. Unaware of his parents' role in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]], Ryley used his music to send codes to [[Keth Beamis]] on Beltrix III. [[Onjo Fegel]], an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] spy from [[Tuttin IV]], tried to infiltrate the Agency as a member of the [[Far Cry]] band, but [[Ryley Ancum]] managed to warn the Rebels ahead of time and foil Fegel's plans. Ryley was delighted and surprised at his audition to learn the cell leaders were his parents and Tramys, his music teacher. He did nothing to show that he recognized them, preserving their cover.
